description: The Legacy Range Mapper component is used in old legacy content from before the Awwdio system.

fields.MinDistance: The field with the legacy min distance.
fields.MaxDistance: The field with the legacy max distance.
fields.Radius: The field to drive with ``MinDistance`` and ``MaxDistance`` converted.
fields.BlendDistance: The field to drive with ``MinDistance`` and ``MaxDistance`` converted.

usage: only used in legacy content from before the Awwdio system.
